---
title: "About Me"
date: "2026-04-02"
---
```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700&family=PT+Sans:wght@400;700&display=swap');
body { font-family: 'PT Sans', sans-serif; }
h1, h2, h3, h4 { font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; }
</style>
```


## Professional Summary

I am an **IP Network Architect** at Ericsson with extensive experience in designing and implementing complex network infrastructures. My expertise spans packet core networks, network slicing, VXLAN BGP EVPN, MPLS L3VPN, and modern cloud-native technologies including Kubernetes and CNCF.

Currently pursuing a **Master's degree in Telecommunications Network Engineering** at École de technologie supérieure (ÉTS), I combine practical industry experience with cutting-edge academic research in machine learning and deep neural networks.

## Current Role

**IP Network Architect** at **Ericsson** (August 2022 - Present)  
*Montreal, Quebec, Canada*

- Architecture of packet core networks and network slices in VXLAN BGP EVPN and MPLS L3VPN environments
- Analysis of requirements into design and implementation for Kubernetes/CNCF/Classic Ethernet networks
- Security and vendor compliance for telecom packet core networks
- Automation of operational tasks and audits

## Core Expertise

### Networking Technologies
- **Network Architecture**: Packet Core, VXLAN BGP EVPN, MPLS L3VPN, SD-WAN
- **Protocols**: BGP, OSPF, Multicast, 802.1x, IPsec VPN
- **Security**: Multi-factor Authentication, IDS/IPS, DDoS Protection, CIS Controls
- **Cloud & Virtualization**: Kubernetes, CNCF, Google Cloud Platform, AWS

### Machine Learning & AI
- **Deep Neural Networks (DNN)**
- **Machine Learning Algorithms**
- **MATLAB** for technical computing and analysis

### Automation & Programming
- **Network Automation**: Ansible, Python, RESTful APIs
- **Protocols**: SSH, Netconf, SNMP
- **Monitoring**: ELK Stack (Elasticsearch), Network KPIs

## Professional Experience Highlights

### Senior Network Engineer - Nuvei (2022)
- Designed greenfield campus LAN and data center with multivendor technologies
- Integrated brownfield networks with AWS infrastructure
- Implemented SAML-based MFA using Microsoft Azure
- Deployed Juniper Mist AI wireless solutions

### Network Engineer R&D - Datavalet Technologies (2018-2022)
- Designed layer 1-3 and security architectures for datacenters and GCP
- Implemented multi-homed BGP with traffic engineering techniques
- Deployed SD-WAN solutions (FortiGate, VMware VeloCloud)
- Automated multivendor equipment using Ansible
- Ensured CIS controls compliance for network security

### Content Specialist - Champlain College (2014-2018)
- Delivered CCNA and CCNP training to over 100 students
- Created engaging content including labs, lectures, and multimedia materials
- Developed interactive learning experiences with videos and quizzes

## Education

**Master's degree, Telecommunications Network Engineering**  
*École de technologie supérieure (ÉTS)* | 2025-2026

**AEC, Computer Systems Networking and Telecommunications**  
*Champlain Regional College* | 2015

**Bachelor's degree, Engineering**  
*Azad University (IAU)* | 2007

## Certifications

- **Cisco Certified Internetwork Expert Data Center (CCIE Data Center)** #67533
- **Juniper Networks Certified Professional, Service Provider Routing & Switching (JNCIP-SP)** #JPR00323255
- **Certified Cisco Systems Instructor (CCSI)**
- **ITIL® Foundation Certificate in IT Service Management (ITILF)**
- **5G for Everyone**
- **Advanced Learning Algorithms**

## Languages

- **English**: Full Professional Proficiency
- **French**: Working proficiency (Montreal-based)

## Connect With Me

- **LinkedIn**: [linkedin.com/in/hosseinoliabak](https://www.linkedin.com/in/hosseinoliabak)
- **GitHub**: [github.com/hosseinoliabak](https://github.com/hosseinoliabak)
- **Credly**: [credly.com/users/hossein-oliabak](https://www.credly.com/users/hossein-oliabak)

---

*This website serves as a platform to share my knowledge and insights in networking, machine learning, and linear algebra through detailed tutorials, labs, and technical documentation.*
